description: Third-party agent skills imported into this repo via `npx skills`. SKILLS.sh reads this file and installs each entry. Managed with `./SKILLS.sh --skills-install`.

skills.why: Supabase project / client / RLS best practice — used by every DB change.
Postgres performance + RLS + schema rules. Required reading before any migration.
Canonical SKILL.md authoring guide. Used when we add a new in-repo skill.
Composio CLI + SDK patterns for YouTube OAuth and action execution.
Tavily search SDK patterns — primary web-search surface for the research agent, with key-level failover.
Firecrawl CLI + deep-scrape patterns (used when Tavily snippets aren't enough).
Exa semantic-search patterns used by the research agent.
yt-dlp invocation patterns for scan + download, including YouTube 403 mitigations.
Curated reference for free LLM providers — covers Groq + Cerebras free-tier limits and SDK patterns.
Durable workflow design (saga / entity / fan-out-in). Maps directly to Hatchet workflows in `/workflows`.
Server/client component boundaries, App Router patterns.
Visual hierarchy, spacing, typography — applied to the chat UI.
Full component lifecycle via `npx shadcn@latest` + composition/form/style rules.
GSAP timeline + stagger + Flip patterns — powers the agent-log choreography.
Pydantic v2 validation + schema patterns — shared between FastAPI, CrewAI agents, and Hatchet task inputs.
